subcodes.title: Words to two Persians from Tihran, spoken on 1912-08-24
subcodes.first_line: The Persians destroyed their home with their own hands in the hope of building another one; but now thy are left in the desert without a home or shelter.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایرانیان بدست خویش خانهٴ خود را خراب کردند بامید ساختن خانهٴ دیگر ولی حال در صحرا بی لانه و آشیانه مانده اند با انکه نوشتنیم
subcodes.subjects: @past, present and future of Iran, @relationship between government and people, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @chastisement and requital
